title: croton glomeratus
intro: Croton glomeratus, also known as the cluster leaf croton, is a plant species in the Euphorbiaceae family that is native to tropical regions. The plant's leaves, stems, and roots have been traditionally used in folk medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Croton glomeratus are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, are often used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and digestive problems.
